name: Kounis Syndrome (Allergic Angina)
description: 32yo male with chest pain + urticaria after penicillin injection — rare allergic coronary spasm

symptoms.text: 32-year-old male presenting with crushing chest pain and urticaria immediately after penicillin injection. History of drug allergies. Dyspnea and diaphoresis present. No prior cardiac history.

ecg.st_segment: ST-segment elevation in leads II, III, aVF
ecg.interpretation: Acute inferior ST elevation with tachycardia
